content.full_text:
October 18, 2000

Peter Baxter
1319 Ingraham Street, #104
Los Angeles, CA 90017

Re: Your correspondence dated September 13, 2000
Our File No. G-00-214

Dear Mr. Baxter:

This letter is in response to your letters dated September 13, 2000, September 19, 2000 and October 5, 2000 to the Mayors and City Councilors of the Cities in the County of Los Angeles, your letter dated September 28, 2000 to the President of the University of Southern California, your letter dated September 25, 2000 to J. Michael Carey, City Clerk for the City of Los Angeles, and your letter dated October 11, 2000 to Ms. LeeAnn Pelham, Interim Executive Director of the City Ethics Commission for the City of Los Angeles. Copies of these letters have been received by the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC"). After reviewing your letters, we have determined that we are unable to provide you with assistance as the subject matter of your letters is outside the jurisdiction of the FPPC. The FPPC solely has jurisdiction over the Political Reform Act (the Act)1, a body of law that is concerned with financial disclosure and disqualification by public officials.

Please note that the Act requires the FPPC to provide formal written advice to any persons whose duties under the Act are in question or to that person's authorized representative (Section 83114(b).) The FPPC does not provide advice to third parties regarding a public official's duties under the Act. (2 Cal. Code Regulations Section 18329(b)(8)(B), a copy of which is enclosed).

Your local District Attorney's office or City Attorney may be of assistance regarding laws that are not within our jurisdiction.

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California Code of Regulations.

Please note that in the future, you will receive a response from the FPPC only if the subject matter of your correspondence is within our jurisdiction.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Kelly L. Winsor
Legal Analyst
